parameters.query:
WITH active_customers AS (
  SELECT
    c.display_name,
    c.username,
    c.message_count,
    c.last_seen_at
  FROM table_1 c
  WHERE c.business_id = $1::uuid
    AND c.last_seen_at > now() - interval '24 hours'
  ORDER BY c.last_seen_at DESC
),
recent_orders AS (
  SELECT
    co.order_number,
    co.items,
    co.total_amount,
    co.status,
    co.payment_status,
    co.delivery_type,
    co.created_at
  FROM table_2 co
  WHERE co.business_id = $1::uuid
    AND co.created_at > now() - interval '24 hours'
  ORDER BY co.created_at DESC
),
daily_revenue AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS total
  FROM table_2
  column_1 $1::uuid
    column_2 now() - interval '24 hours'
    AND status NOT IN ('cancelled')
),
pending_payments AS (
  SELECT count(*) AS cnt
  FROM table_2
  column_1 $1::uuid
    AND payment_status IN ('unpaid', 'proof_submitted')
    AND status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'delivered')
),
daily_credits AS (
  -- Credits are per TENANT not per business
  SELECT
    action_type,
    SUM(credits_used) AS naira_spent
  FROM table_3
  column_3 $2::uuid
    column_2 now() - interval '24 hours'
    column_4 0
  GROUP BY action_type
  ORDER BY naira_spent DESC
),
appointment_count AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM table_2
  column_1 $1::uuid
    column_2 now() - interval '24 hours'
    column_5 'appointment'
),
product_order_count AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM table_2
  column_1 $1::uuid
    column_2 now() - interval '24 hours'
    column_5= 'appointment'
),
chat_samples AS (
  -- Chat history is tenant-scoped
  SELECT
    message->>'type' AS msg_type,
    message->'data'->>'content' AS content
  FROM table_4
  WHERE session_id LIKE 'cust_%_' || $2::text
  ORDER BY id DESC
  LIMIT 30
)
SELECT
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(ac)) FROM table_5 ac) AS customers,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(ro)) FROM table_6 ro)    AS orders,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(cs)) FROM table_7 cs)     AS chats,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(dc)) FROM table_8 dc)    AS credit_usage,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM table_5)                     AS customer_count,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM table_6)                        AS order_count,
  (SELECT total FROM table_9)                           AS daily_revenue,
  (SELECT cnt FROM table_10)                          AS pending_payment_count,
  (SELECT cnt FROM table_11)                         AS appointment_count,
  (SELECT cnt FROM table_12)                       AS product_order_count

WITH weekly_stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.platform_id)          AS unique_customers,
    COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(c.last_seen_at))   AS active_days,
    AVG(c.message_count)                   AS avg_messages_per_customer
  FROM table_1 c
  WHERE c.business_id = $1::uuid
    AND c.last_seen_at > now() - interval '7 days'
),
order_stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*)                                 AS total_orders,
    COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0)           AS total_revenue,
    COALESCE(AVG(total_amount), 0)           AS avg_order_value,
    COUNT(DISTINCT customer_chat_id)         AS ordering_customers
  FROM table_2
  column_1 $1::uuid
    column_2 now() - interval '7 days'
    AND status NOT IN ('cancelled')
),
top_products AS (
  SELECT
    item->>'name'                            AS product_name,
    SUM((item->>'quantity')::int)            AS qty_sold
  FROM table_2,
       jsonb_array_elements(items) AS item
  column_1 $1::uuid
    column_2 now() - interval '7 days'
    AND status NOT IN ('cancelled')
  GROUP BY product_name
  ORDER BY qty_sold DESC
  LIMIT 3
),
hourly_activity AS (
  SELECT
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM table_14 AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Lagos') AS hour,
    COUNT(*)                                                     AS interactions
  FROM table_1
  column_1 $1::uuid
    column_6 now() - interval '7 days'
  GROUP BY hour
  ORDER BY interactions DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
retention AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
      WHEN last_seen_at > now() - interval '7 days'
      THEN platform_id END)                  AS active_this_week,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
      WHEN last_seen_at >  now() - interval '30 days'
       column_6= now() - interval '7 days'
      THEN platform_id END)                  AS active_previous_weeks
  FROM table_1
  column_1 $1::uuid
),
weekly_credits AS (
  -- Credits are per tenant, not per business
  SELECT
    action_type,
    SUM(credits_used)                        AS naira_spent
  FROM table_3
  column_3 $2::uuid
    column_2 now() - interval '7 days'
    column_4 0
  GROUP BY action_type
  ORDER BY naira_spent DESC
),
weekly_appointment_count AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM table_2
  column_1 $1::uuid
    column_2 now() - interval '7 days'
    column_5 'appointment'
    AND status NOT IN ('cancelled')
)
SELECT
  (SELECT unique_customers      FROM table_15)                    AS unique_customers,
  (SELECT total_orders          FROM table_16)                     AS total_orders,
  (SELECT total_revenue         FROM table_16)                     AS total_revenue,
  (SELECT avg_order_value       FROM table_16)                     AS avg_order_value,
  (SELECT ordering_customers    FROM table_16)                     AS ordering_customers,
  (SELECT active_days           FROM table_15)                    AS active_days,
  (SELECT avg_messages_per_customer FROM table_15)                AS avg_messages,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(tp)) FROM table_17 tp)             AS top_products,
  (SELECT hour                  FROM table_18)                 AS peak_hour,
  (SELECT interactions          FROM table_18)                 AS peak_interactions,
  (SELECT active_this_week      FROM table_19)                       AS active_this_week,
  (SELECT active_previous_weeks FROM table_19)                       AS active_previous_weeks,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(wc)) FROM table_20 wc)           AS credit_usage,
  (SELECT cnt                   FROM table_21)        AS appointment_count

SELECT
  t.id                         AS tenant_id,
  bp.id                        AS business_id,
  t.telegram_id                AS owner_telegram_id,
  t.preferred_name,
  t.full_name,
  bp.business_name,
  bp.business_mode,
  ac.agent_name,
  ac.tone_profile,
  pi.access_token              AS bot_token
FROM table_22 t
JOIN table_23 bp
  ON bp.tenant_id = t.id
JOIN table_24 ac
  ON ac.business_id = bp.id
JOIN table_25 pi
  ON pi.business_id = bp.id
  AND pi.platform = 'telegram'
  AND pi.is_active = true
WHERE t.onboarding_completed = true
ORDER BY t.id, bp.id

SELECT
  t.id                         AS tenant_id,
  bp.id                        AS business_id,
  t.telegram_id                AS owner_telegram_id,
  t.preferred_name,
  t.full_name,
  bp.business_name,
  bp.business_mode,
  ac.agent_name,
  ac.tone_profile,
  pi.access_token              AS bot_token
FROM table_22 t
JOIN table_23 bp
  ON bp.tenant_id = t.id
JOIN table_24 ac
  ON ac.business_id = bp.id
JOIN table_25 pi
  ON pi.business_id = bp.id
  AND pi.platform = 'telegram'
  AND pi.is_active = true
WHERE t.onboarding_completed = true
ORDER BY t.id, bp.id
